text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O's name has been growing in
popularity.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, shortly after receiving her signature
racewear...

text_block_list.name: Public Relations Committee Chief
text_block_list.text: Excuse me! Is anyone there?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh, a visitor?

text_block_list.name: Public Relations Committee Chief
text_block_list.text:
Hello! I am the head of the Public Relations
Committee.

text_block_list.name: Public Relations Committee Chief
text_block_list.text:
For next month's issue, we want to write an article
about some of the newly debuted signature
racewear this season.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Are you gonna do a piece on me?! Like an
interview?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
And I'm being asked by a chief! Someone high up
on the hierarchy just like yours truly! Hoho,
there's no way I can refuse!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Can I do it, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Well, increasing her media coverage would be a
good thing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Among Sakura Bakushin O's classmates are some
strong contenders including Rice Shower, Mihono
Bourbon, and Nishino Flower.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I should be proactive in promoting and raising her
reputation so she doesn't fall behind.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Yay! I'm gonna charm their socks off!
choice_data_list: Let your legs do the speaking.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Right! We Umamusume shine the most when we're
on the track!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Let's head to the training grounds! Come and see
me running in my signature racewear!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She grabs her signature racewear and sprints
outside without another moment's hesitation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I apologize to the chief and the committee
members left behind in her wake and together we
follow after Sakura Bakushin O.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh! How about it? Looking on point and
elegant from head to toe, aren't I?

text_block_list.name: Public Relations Committee Chief
text_block_list.text:
Fantastic! The cherry blossom design totally suits
you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yes! Yes! And it looks even better once I start
running! Just take a look!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I'm off!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: You got it!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I stand before you as the true Bakushin O,
dressed in my signature racewear!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
HERE I BAKUSHIN! Step back and witness my
reborn strength!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Haaa!

text_block_list.name: Public Relations Committee Chief
text_block_list.text:
What frightful speed! I think I finally get what she
means by "Bakushin"! This truly is the very peak of
running speed!
choice_data_list: That was the fastest I've seen you go yet!
That was the fastest I've seen you go yet!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Heh heh! And this isn't even my final form!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Time to go into OVERDRIVE! BAKUUUSHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Public Relations Committee Chief
text_block_list.text: Impossible! How can she go even faster?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Break the limits! Bakushin, BAKUSHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... I-I think that was a pretty good showing!

text_block_list.name: Public Relations Committee Member
text_block_list.text:
We managed to get some amazing photos! This is
going to make for a great article, Chief!

text_block_list.name: Public Relations Committee Chief
text_block_list.text:
It is indeed! How about this for a headline... Fast
as a speeding bullet! BAKUSHIN!

text_block_list.name: Public Relations Committee Chief
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I think we have everything we need. Thank
you kindly for your cooperation!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: No problem! Come back anytime!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, she drops down to the ground with a
sigh.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's hit her limit. It seems she still hasn't
overcome her endurance issues.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nevertheless, the article turns out great. Sakura
Bakushin O's popularity begins to rise by leaps
and bounds.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I understand. Leave it to me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I'm going to unleash all this surging enthusiasm!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As they want to take photos as well, Sakura
Bakushin O wears her signature racewear for the
interview.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Thanks for waiting!

text_block_list.name: Public Relations Committee Chief
text_block_list.text:
Fantastic! The cherry blossom design totally suits
you!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I know, right?!

text_block_list.name: Public Relations Committee Chief
text_block_list.text:
I heard that you were the one who requested the
cherry blossom motif?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Yep! My name is "Sakura" Bakushin O after all!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
My destiny was decided the day I received this
name.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! As vivid and elegant as the cherry
blossoms in full bloom! I have to keep pushing my
Bakushin to the limit!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
There is no design better suited to grace my
signature racewear than the noble cherry
blossom!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I will bloom gloriously, both as a racer and class
representative!

text_block_list.name: Public Relations Committee Chief
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for that wonderful story. With this,
we'll be able to write a great article!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
No problem-o! Next, I'm going to tell you all
about being class representative!

text_block_list.name: Public Relations Committee Chief
text_block_list.text:
H-huh? Y-you don't need to... We, uh, can save
that for another day perhaps.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Don't be shy! I'll tell you all the details, from start
to finish!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
...And so, that's how I began on the path of being
the class representative!

text_block_list.name: Public Relations Committee Chief
text_block_list.text: I-is that so?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Always pure and honorable! I'll continue to
Bakushin as the class representative!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...And with that, Sakura Bakushin O's interview
comes to an end.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The article turns out to be superb, and the
public's perception of Sakura Bakushin O
improves greatly.
